titles.title: Lord We've Come to Worship – v2

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, we've come to worship And we have come to pray Lord, we've come to listen And hear what you would say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, our hearts are longing To meet with you today For we have come to seek you And we have come to say

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Worthy, you are worthy King of kings, Lord of lords You are worthy All blessing and power All riches and wisdom All glory and honor and praise To the Lamb

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord, we need forgiveness We're wandered far away Look down in tender mercy Forgive our sins we pray

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: O Lord, we need revival All across this land Come move among your people With your mighty hand

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: To the Lamb that was slain To redeem us back to God again To the Lamb Who will reign Forever and ever, amen To the Lamb that was slain To redeem us back to God again To the Lamb Who will reign Forever and ever, amen

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Forever and ever Forever and ever Forever and ever Forever and ever Amen, amen, amen
